case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. LEONEL SALAZAR CHAVEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR CHAVEZ, LEONEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-07-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR FILED. PERSON APPEARING: JOSE PALACIOS (BRANCH MANAGER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED NOV-01-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR CHAVEZ, LEONEL
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-07-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-07-2012 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ROSARIO CHACON--BRANCH MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-07-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALAZAR CHAVEZ, LEONEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,585.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $27.40 ACCRUED INTEREST, $30.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR CHAVEZ, LEONEL
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR CHAVEZ, LEONEL
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR CHAVEZ, LEONEL
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED (WRIT ISSUED ON JAN-25-13) AS TO DEFENDANT SALAZAR CHAVEZ, LEONEL
